meaning: n.汉堡帽,小礼帽,洪堡软毡帽,卷边男毡帽
examples: There is a Homburg and there is a Borsalino, here's Bohr mixing it up with royalty.
He is now under the protection of the homburg-wearing Tongan monarch, King George Tupou v, a distant relative of Mr Mara's father.
Those that the doctor raised in the tap water in Bad Homburg that has no iron and fed on beef-heart and white worms has no red colour.
The family prides itself on its loyalty to its holdings, which are managed from Bad Homburg, a swanky town near Frankfurt.
She lives in Bad Homburg, Germany.
